docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-22-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-16-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAULKNER, TERENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, WILLIAM $267.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $307.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

COMPARE AND/OR CERTIFY COPY OF ANY RECORD ON FILE FOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAULKNER, TERENCE

IN DEPT M30. DEPT M30 IS LOCATED AT THE HALL OF JUSTICE, 850 BRYANT ST. S.F. CA.
